<!-- markdownlint-disable MD041 -->

## ARC Transition to Final

Use this template when requesting transition of an ARC from `Last Call` to `Final`.

## Summary

Describe the evidence that this ARC is implemented, adopted, and ready for finalization.

## Canonical References

- Tracking Issue:
- ARC File:
- Adoption Summary File:
- Reference Implementation Repository:
- Related Issues / PRs:

## Requested Status Change

- [ ] Change ARC status to `Final`

## Final Gate Checklist

- [ ] The `Last Call` period completed.
- [ ] Any material review feedback has been addressed.
- [ ] The tracking issue records the decision basis.
- [ ] The adoption summary is current.

## Adoption Evidence

- [ ] Public adoption evidence is documented in the adoption summary.
- [ ] At least one adoption category contains at least one adopter entry.
- [ ] At least one real ecosystem implementation is documented.
- [ ] Any known interoperability concerns have been recorded.

### If `implementation-required: true`

- [ ] The reference implementation repository is maintained.
- [ ] The implementation is usable as a canonical reference.
- [ ] The ARC front matter still declares the canonical implementation URL and maintainers.
- [ ] The implementation status in the adoption summary is current.

## Requested Maintainer Action

- [ ] Set status to `Final`

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any last context, limitations, or post-final follow-up items.
